session.user: Run the ruff linter on the entire project and report results. Command: `cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && uv run ruff check src/ packages/ tests/ 2>&1 | tail -30`. Report the full output.
session.assistant: I'll run the ruff linter on the project and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/ packages/ tests/ 2>&1 | tail -30
Run ruff linter on src/, packages/, tests/ directories

session.assistant:
ruff passed: All checks passed!
The linter found no violations across the src/, packages/, and tests/ directories.
